However, without more specific information, I can only provide a rough estimate. Considering her peak popularity and the typical production schedule of TV shows, I would narrow it down to between 1958 and 1964, when she was at the height of her fame and TV shows were more commonly produced.</think>
<answer> 1958-1964 </answer>
